oneSentenceTake: The last seven days in diverse intelligence and emergence engineering have been characterized by the maturation of conceptual frameworks like TAME and 'Mind Everywhere,' alongside practical advancements in bioelectric reprogramming and evolutionary robotics for engineering agential problem-solving in synthetic living systems.
superGrokProof: Grok 4.20 Beta, 'Agents thinking' status, and deep search integration for arXiv preprints from Feb 2026.

accounts.reason: Central figure formalizing DI/TAME and bioelectric reprogramming; posts daily on engineering goal-directed emergence in synthetic tissues.
Co-creator of xenobots; posts on polycomputers, evolutionary robotics, and scaling emergent intelligence in living machines.
Leads Synthetic Biological Intelligence work with neuron-on-chip systems; focuses on real-world emergence engineering of hybrid intelligence.
Official account for the lab pioneering biological computing platforms; tracks live updates on scaling emergent computation from neuron collectives.
Focuses on transcriptomics and novel control of xenobots/anthrobots; bridges gene expression with morphological emergence engineering.
